title: Trump says British Prime Minister will step down
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said that British Prime Minister Keir Starmer will step down in a Truth Social post.

title: Supreme Court faces new wave of cases over state election laws
shortDescription: The Supreme Court is considering new appeals regarding voting laws in Arkansas, Texas, Arizona and Pennsylvania.

title: Trump says Reflecting Pool needs repairs, blames 'terrible Vandals'
shortDescription: President Trump said more people have been arrested for vandalism of the Reflecting Pool, which now likely needs to be drained and repaired again.

title: Biden loses bid to block release of memoir audio recordings
shortDescription: Judge allows DOJ to release Biden memoir audio to Heritage Foundation, rejecting bid to block disclosure; Biden plans appeal.

title: Senate panel considers vote to shield special ed from RFK Jr.'s agency
shortDescription: The Republican chairman of the Senate's education panel promised Democrats a committee vote to prevent special ed programs from going to HHS.

title: Shaky Iran peace deal meets skepticism from Senate Republicans
shortDescription: The Republican chairman of the Senate Armed Services Committee said planned payouts to Iran would make an Obama-era deal look like a "pittance."

title: Trump blames vandals for Reflecting Pool algae
shortDescription: In a Truth Social post, President Donald Trump blamed vandals for troubles that have cropped up after the $16 million reflecting pool renovation.

title: President Trump blames vandals amid Reflecting Pool algae bloom
shortDescription: "We've had some real problems with vandalism at the beautiful reflecting pool," President Donald Trump said on Truth Social on Friday, June 19.

title: Trump reveals Air Force One from Qatar royals
shortDescription: Trump revealed a lavish Boeing 747-8, a $400M gift from Qatar, as the latest addition to the Air Force One fleet.

title: 'Finest in the world.' Trump unveils Air Force One gifted by Qatar
shortDescription: President Donald Trump rolled out his much-debated lavish new ride — a Qatar-gifted Boeing 747 jet that is now the new Air Force One.

title: Trump touts new Air Force One
shortDescription: President Trump showed off the new Air Force One from Qatar at Joint Base Andrews in Maryland.

title: 'Neither I nor Italy ever beg': PM Meloni rebukes Trump claim
shortDescription: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni accused President Trump of making up a story that she begged him for a photograph at this week's G7 summit.

title: Trump claims 'no limits' on his power
shortDescription: President Donald Trump claims there are "no limits" on his power while discussing Iran conflict on "The Axios Show."

title: Trump to spend weekend at Camp David with Iran negotiations on hold
shortDescription: President Trump is set to spend the weekend at Camp David as his administration tries to jump-start talks on a final deal with Iran.

title: Trump expects Vance to travel to Switzerland for talks. Iran updates
shortDescription: Vance didn't travel to Europe on Friday as planned for negotiations to end the war with Iran, a White House official confirmed to USA TODAY.

title: Trump admin removed 57 things from national parks. Here's the list.
shortDescription: Among the 57 items that the Trump administration removed from national parks were junior ranger books and portrait descriptions.

title: How does Trump's preliminary Iran deal compare with Obama's Iran deal?
shortDescription: President Trump's memorandum was the second attempt by the United States in recent years to prevent Iran from developing a nuclear weapon.

title: Trump was notably absent from the Obama Presidential Center dedication
shortDescription: The Obama Presidential Center dedication ceremony was a bi-partisan affair with presidents Biden, Clinton and Bush in attendance. Trump was not.
